solution.python:
from selenium import webdriver
from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By
import pytest

class TestHeadless_Testing:
    
    @pytest.fixture(autouse=True)
    def setup(self):
        self.driver = webdriver.Chrome()
        yield
        self.driver.quit()
